run.requirements: Launch a Solana token via Bags API, earn and claim creator fees

summary.building: Launch a Solana token through the Bags API and earn + claim creator trading fees.
summary.topRisk: Omitting the creator wallet from the fee-share array launches a token where the creator earns 0% of all trading fees, forever, with no fix after launch.
summary.mustDecideFirst: The fee mode UUID (bagsConfigType) and the fee-share array — both are immutable on-chain after launch.
summary.watchOutFor: Mainnet-only (no devnet — testing costs real SOL), a mandatory fee-share step with no skip path, and a Jito-bundle submission that needs a tip.

risks.title: Zero-revenue fee-share config
risks.detail: Fee sharing BPS must sum to 10,000 and the creator must be explicitly included. Omitting the creator wallet from feeClaimers deploys a token where the creator earns zero fees forever; the bagsConfigType and claimer structure are immutable on-chain after launch.

risks.title: Launch fails without fee-share config
risks.detail: Calling createLaunchTransaction before a fee share config exists returns an error. The fee-share step cannot be skipped.

risks.title: Unsupported social provider fails at claimer lookup
risks.detail: Using 'discord' or 'telegram' fails at fee-claimer lookup. Only 'twitter', 'kick', and 'github' are supported.

risks.title: LUT slot-timing race
risks.detail: When LUTs are required (>15 claimers), the extend transaction must wait one Solana slot after LUT creation. Parallelizing or skipping the wait causes the extend to fail silently or revert.

risks.title: Jito tip may be too low under load
risks.detail: Tip uses the 95th percentile; during high network load bundles may not land. The 0.015 SOL fallback is conservative but can be expensive at high SOL prices.

preCodingDecisions.title: Fee mode UUID (bagsConfigType)
preCodingDecisions.detail: Four modes exist; the choice is stored on-chain and permanent. For a straightforward launch use Default (fa29606e-5e48-4c37-827f-4b03d58ee23d) or omit to get the default.

preCodingDecisions.title: Fee-share array must include the creator
preCodingDecisions.detail: The creator wallet must appear in feeClaimers with userBps summing to 10000. Set on-chain at launch and not correctable afterward.

requirementsCorrections.detail: No RPC endpoint is specified. The public api.mainnet-beta.solana.com is rate-limited; a paid RPC (Helius, QuickNode, etc.) is needed for repeated runs.
The spec says 'creator keeps 100% of trading fees' but does not name the fee mode. The mode must be chosen explicitly before launch because it cannot be changed after deployment.
